zh.lifeSummary: 當John Milbourne於大約1404年出生在英國賀福爾提林頓時，他的父親Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne33歲，母親Elizabeth de Eylesford25歲。他於大約1429年與Elizabeth Anne Devereux在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年9月7日在英國賀福爾波吉爾享年32歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾波吉爾聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Milbourne于大约1404年出生在英国賀福爾提林頓时，他的父亲Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne33岁，母亲Elizabeth de Eylesford25岁。他于大约1429年与Elizabeth Anne Devereux在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1435年9月7日在英国賀福爾波吉爾享年32岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾波吉爾聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Milbourne was born about 1404, in Tillington, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth de Eylesford, was 25. He married Elizabeth Anne Devereux about 1429, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 7 September 1435, in Burghill, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 32, and was buried in St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Milbourne est né environ 1404, à Tillington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth d’Eylesford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Anne Devereux environ 1429, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1435, à Burghill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, H: St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Milbourne um 1404 in Tillington, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne 33 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Eylesford 25. Er hat um 1429 in Herefordshire, England Elizabeth Anne Devereux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 7. September 1435 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Burghill, Herefordshire, England und wurde in St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Milbourne è nato il circa 1404 nel Tillington, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Eylesford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Anne Devereux circa 1429, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1435, nel Burghill, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Milbourneが約1404年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアティリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Piers Peter de Milbourneは33歳，母Elizabeth de Eylesfordは25歳であった。約1429年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでElizabeth Anne Devereuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年9月7日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブルギルで32歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブルギルスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, H: 영국 허퍼드실르 버그힐 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Milbourne(이)가 대략 1404년 영국 허퍼드실르 틸링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Eylesford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1429년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Elizabeth Anne Devereux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 9월 7일 영국 허퍼드실르 버그힐에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 버그힐 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, H: St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Milbourne nasceu aproximadamente 1404, em Tillington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Eylesford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Anne Devereux aproximadamente 1429, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1435, em Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, H: St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, England

ru.St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, H: ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Milbourne родился около 1404 г. в местности тиллингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Eylesford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Anne Devereux около 1429 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 7 сентября 1435 г. в местности бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Milbourne nació aproximadamente 1404, en Tillington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Piers Peter de Milbourne, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Eylesford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Anne Devereux aproximadamente 1429, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1435, en Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary the Virgin's Church, Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
